Off Calendar Mar-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-22-2022 Continued To Mar-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Laurelle Guttierrez-Lundq, via ZOOM, counsel for Carolyn Block Arnelle, Petitioner.

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 10, 2014 is admitted to probate. Carolyn Block Arnelle is appointed as Executor of the estate with full IAEA authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 17, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
